original_prompt: add the following features: products that will be installed should be selected prior to the appointment... appointment duration depends on the count of products: create a product types entity...
rephrased_goal: Add Product Types entity, dynamic appointment duration based on products & travel distance, update Gantt chart by Tech, fix van coverage save bug, add hardware CSV template, add loaders, enhance lazy data loading.

Update index.html nav to link to #product-types

Save function captures map coordinates and pushes.

subtasks_required: Change grouping from Appointment to PS Tech
Render 1 timeline per tech showing all their appointments

tasks.description: Do-Pebble: Appointment Location -> Products -> Duration -> Slots Flow
